channel.title: Journal — Igor For Men
channel.description: Notes on men's grooming from a private West Hollywood salon.

item.title: How Much Does a Male Brazilian Wax Cost in LA? (2026 Pricing Guide)
item.description: A male Brazilian wax in Los Angeles typically starts at $145 and can reach $200 or more depending on the salon, practitioner experience, and service model. At Igor For Men in West Hollywood, the service begins at $145+ and includes a private suite, hard wax application, and a practitioner with over 21 years of experience. Prices reflect the appointment-only model and discreet setting on Larrabee …

item.title: Your First Male Brazilian in West Hollywood: A Discreet Walk-Through
item.description: A first-time male Brazilian wax takes 30–45 minutes in a private suite. You undress from the waist down, lie on a cushioned table, and the practitioner applies hard wax in sections—front, underside, and between. The wax hardens in seconds and lifts off without strips. Most men describe the sensation as sharp but brief, and easier than they expected. Book your appointment at least 48 hours out. Ha…
